title: lathyrus nissolia subsp. puberulus
intro: Lathyrus nissolia subsp. puberulus, a sub species of the Lathyrus nissolia plant, is a type of wild pea native to the Iberian Peninsula and North Africa. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy. In herbal preparations, Lathyrus nissolia subsp. puberulus can be found in teas, infusions, and decoctions, often used to support digestive and respiratory health.
